name: stellar-ecosystem
description: Privacy-First X-Ray Ecosystem for Analytics and Visualization

scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:contracts && npm run build:docs && npm run build:service-discovery
scripts.test: npm run test:shared && npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend && npm run test:contracts
scripts.lint: npm run lint:shared && npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:contracts
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check:shared && npm run type-check:backend && npm run type-check:frontend && npm run type-check:contracts
scripts.setup: npm install && npm install --prefix shared && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix contracts && npm install --prefix docs && npm install --prefix service-discovery-dashboard

author: Stellar Team
